feed.title: W!K!
feed.subtitle: 人在阳光下，怎能不阳光

entry.title: Can UID be changed on Mifare 1K Card?
entry.summary: A lot of guys want to clone their access card, so they buy more mifare 1k card to copy to. But after the package received, what they found is that block 0 of sector 0 can not be modified. There are some different reasons which may cause this issues.
entry.content: A lot of guys want to clone their access card, so they buy more mifare 1k card to copy to. But after the package received, what they found is that block 0 of sector 0 can not be modified. There are some different reasons which may cause this issues.

entry.title: RFID Tools - The Best RFID App on Android Phone
entry.summary: Meeting RFID - Radio Frequency IDentification, there are a lot of excellent open-source tools and great devices for sniffing and cracking. And mostly, those open-source projects are built for Linux and Windows. In this title I'll introduce the best RFID App, RFID Tools, which supports a lot of libnfc tools on Android Phone.
entry.content: Meeting RFID - Radio Frequency IDentification, there are a lot of excellent open-source tools and great devices for sniffing and cracking. And mostly, those open-source projects are built for Linux and Windows. In this title I'll introduce the best RFID App, RFID Tools, which supports a lot of libnfc tools on Android Phone.

entry.title: 如何制作串口-蓝牙一体式PN532
entry.summary: PN532作为史上最低成本RFID的硬件设备，是无法直接上电工作的，它需要在串口通信下传递数据，因此需要串口模块，那么所有串口通信的模块理论上都支持的，本文里接招制作一个带有USB串口和蓝牙串口的一体式PN532。
entry.content: PN532作为史上最低成本RFID的硬件设备，是无法直接上电工作的，它需要在串口通信下传递数据，因此需要串口模块，那么所有串口通信的模块理论上都支持的，本文里接招制作一个带有USB串口和蓝牙串口的一体式PN532。

entry.title: 使用python处理年份范围的汇总
entry.summary: 在处理许多年份的数据中，遇到需要将查询到的年份进行归类汇总的需求。要求是连续的年份只显示最早与最末的年份，独立没有连续的年份可单独跟随在之前
entry.content: 在处理许多年份的数据中，遇到需要将查询到的年份进行归类汇总的需求。要求是连续的年份只显示最早与最末的年份，独立没有连续的年份可单独跟随在之前

entry.title: 使用ESP8266做一个小心意儿
entry.summary:
Day 1

醒的好早，突然想到了做Arduino的点子，上班前就下单了两套微雪电子的e-Paper ESP8266 Driver Board
entry.content:
Day 1

醒的好早，突然想到了做Arduino的点子，上班前就下单了两套微雪电子的e-Paper ESP8266 Driver Board

entry.title: How to calculate CRC8 & CRC16 in MTools
entry.summary: CRC - Cyclic Redundancy Check is widely used in data transition. According to wikipedia.org, A CRC-enabled device calculates a short, fixed-length binary sequence, known as the check value or CRC, for each block of data to be sent or stored and appends it to the data, forming a codeword.
entry.content: CRC - Cyclic Redundancy Check is widely used in data transition. According to wikipedia.org, A CRC-enabled device calculates a short, fixed-length binary sequence, known as the check value or CRC, for each block of data to be sent or stored and appends it to the data, forming a codeword.

entry.title: Python 数据处理之字段去重
entry.summary: 在之前遇到的数据中，由于同一部件的可替换不同产品，造成了同一行出现了2次及以上同样的字段和属性值，而只需要其中的一个以及对应值即可，此文记录下处理的过程。
entry.content: 在之前遇到的数据中，由于同一部件的可替换不同产品，造成了同一行出现了2次及以上同样的字段和属性值，而只需要其中的一个以及对应值即可，此文记录下处理的过程。

entry.title: OpenWRT自定义按钮的功能
entry.summary:
几乎在所有的无线路由器基本上都有自带一个按钮，简简单单2个作用：
1.短按WPS连接
2.长按恢复出厂
entry.content:
几乎在所有的无线路由器基本上都有自带一个按钮，简简单单2个作用：
1.短按WPS连接
2.长按恢复出厂

entry.title: 4 Steps to clone access card by phone
entry.summary:
Many people are curious on how to clone access card for convinience or just for fun. Most access system with RFID verify visitors with UID in the access card. It's the first 4 bytes hex data of Block 0 in Sector 0.
Follow the steps bellow to clone an access card.
entry.content:
Many people are curious on how to clone access card for convinience or just for fun. Most access system with RFID verify visitors with UID in the access card. It's the first 4 bytes hex data of Block 0 in Sector 0.
Follow the steps bellow to clone an access card.

entry.title: How to use NFC as a mifare card reader - Charge
entry.summary:
The last post shows how to use MTools to read money data on Sector 3.
Here's the tutorial to show how to charge mifare 1k card with regular rule on 2 blocks.
entry.content:
The last post shows how to use MTools to read money data on Sector 3.
Here's the tutorial to show how to charge mifare 1k card with regular rule on 2 blocks.
